chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI CP No.D-2670 of 2010 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.13758/2011 2. For hearing of main case 15.10.2025 Mr. Ali Asadullah Bullo, advocate for petitioner Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, DAG Mr. Ahmed Magsi, advocate for respondents No.2&3 Private Respondents, namely, Munir Ahmed Jamali, Wazir Khan, and Abdul Ghaffar ---- This petition was initially filed by the petitioner seeking his own appointment on the ground that he was qualified, whereas the private respondents were not. Realizing this fact, this Court converted this petition into one for quo warranto and issued notices to the respondents. But, since then, 15 years have passed, and much water has flown from under the bridges meanwhile. Therefore, with consent, we dispose of this petition, and the matter is referred to the competent authority viz. respondents No.1 and 2, for a decision to be made within a period of three months. This petition is disposed of in above terms along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Rafiq/P.A
